productName: Shatter J's Infused Blunt Sour Diesel - 1g
description: This infused hybrid blunt pairs Sour Diesel with a concentrate boost for a thicker, longer-lasting session and a noticeably stronger hit. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of diesel, chemical, and skunk, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
